mechanics.excerpt: The story iS the overall plot; general outline for what might happen at certain times or in reaction to other events It is more concrete than that untii the players become involved that point, the adventure becomes involving and dramatic as that great movie you saw last week Or that great book you stayed up all night to finish In some ways it'$ even better; because you helped create it.
